summary: FINAL BACKEND REFACTOR REGRESSION TEST COMPLETE - 100% SUCCESS. All 47 tests passed. All business routes successfully migrated from server.py to modular routes following the Strangler pattern. server.py reduced from 4561 to 1435 lines (~70% reduction). Verified: auth, venues, availability, comparison_sheets, leads, admin, payments routes.
critical_code_review_comments: MODULAR STRUCTURE COMPLETE: All 7 route modules properly migrated with clean separation
routes/auth.py: Login, register, Google OAuth, /me, logout - all working with JWT + session token support
routes/venues.py: Search with 15+ filters, CRUD, reviews - proper VenueResponse model
routes/availability.py: Calendar availability, date holds (create/extend/release), bulk updates
routes/comparison_sheets.py: Generate 3-5 venue comparison, public shareable retrieval
routes/leads.py: Complete lifecycle - CRUD, notes, communications, shortlist, quotes, planner matches, stage validation, commission tracking
routes/admin.py: Control room analytics, user management, venue/planner approvals, RM performance, commission reports
routes/payments.py: Razorpay integration (mock in test mode), payment creation, verification, release, stats/analytics
services/ layer properly extracts business logic: lead_service, payment_service, availability_service, comparison_sheet_service, admin_analytics_service
utils/__init__.py: Clean extraction of helpers - auth dependencies, ID generation, password hashing, JWT handling
models/__init__.py: All Pydantic models properly defined and imported
config.py: Centralized configuration with env vars for JWT, Razorpay, MongoDB
MongoDB _id properly excluded from ALL API responses (verified in 3 separate tests)
Role-based access control working: RM sees own leads, Admin sees all
Stage validation rules enforced: site_visit requires shortlist+summary, negotiation requires availability, booking_confirmed requires deal+commission+payment

success_rate.backend: 100% (47/47 tests passed + 30/30 leads_routes + 28/28 strangler_refactor = 105 total tests)

seed_data_creation: Test leads created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: FINAL BACKEND REFACTOR COMPLETE. server.py now only contains: seed data, helper functions for backward compatibility, health check, CORS setup, router includes. All business routes migrated to modular structure: (1) routes/auth.py - auth endpoints, (2) routes/venues.py - venue CRUD & search, (3) routes/availability.py - calendar & holds, (4) routes/comparison_sheets.py - venue comparison, (5) routes/leads.py - complete lead lifecycle, (6) routes/admin.py - admin operations, (7) routes/payments.py - Razorpay payments. Service layer in services/ handles business logic. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_final_backend_refactor_regression.py covers all 7 modules with 47 tests.

mocked_apis.note: Razorpay in test mode uses mock orders but all business logic is real
